settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, AI guardrails, and preferences
settings.languageHelper: Changes the interface language and text direction
settings.financialDesc: Control spending limits for AI-initiated transactions
settings.autoApproveDesc: When enabled, agents can autonomously approve recurring payments, vendor invoices, and operational expenses below the specified amount without requiring manual review.
settings.commDesc: Define what OpsHR-Agent can communicate externally
settings.sendEmailsDesc: Allows OpsHR-Agent to send onboarding emails, interview invitations, and standard HR correspondence using your business email address.
settings.publishJobsDesc: Allows OpsHR-Agent to create and publish job listings to connected platforms (LinkedIn, Indeed) without prior approval.
settings.legalDesc: Control signing authority and legal document handling
settings.requireSignature: Require manual signature for ALL contracts
settings.requireSignatureDesc: When enabled, every contract, agreement, and legally binding document will require your explicit digital signature in the Action Center.
settings.warningDesc: Disabling manual signatures allows agents to execute contracts on your behalf.
settings.aiControlsDesc: These guardrails define what your AI agents can do autonomously. Actions exceeding these limits will require your explicit approval via the Action Center.
settings.aboveThreshold: will be sent to you for approval in the Action Center.

avatar.title: Profile Photo
avatar.desc: Upload a photo to personalize your account

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.desc: Your account details used across Genesis services
personal.languageHelper: Changes the UI language and text direction (LTR / RTL)

security.title: Security
security.desc: Protect your account with strong authentication
security.changePasswordDesc: Update your password regularly. Must be at least 12 characters with upper/lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
security.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security. When enabled, you'll need to enter a verification code from your authenticator app each time you sign in.
security.twoFactorDisabled: Disabled — your account is less secure

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.desc: Choose how you want to receive alerts from Genesis
channels.whatsappDesc: Receive real-time agent updates and approval requests via WhatsApp. This is the fastest channel for time-sensitive actions.
channels.emailDesc: Get daily digest summaries, document attachments, and compliance reports delivered to your inbox.
channels.pushDesc: Browser push notifications for critical alerts when you're working in other applications.

alerts.title: Alert Types
alerts.approvalDesc: Get notified immediately when an AI agent needs your sign-off to proceed with an action.
alerts.legalDocDesc: Alerts when a new contract, agreement, or legal filing is ready and awaiting your digital signature.
alerts.billingDesc: Receive a monthly overview of your Genesis subscription charges, token usage, and payment receipts.

chat.disclaimer: Genesis Orchestrator may make mistakes. Verify important actions.
chat.approvedMessage: You approved this action. The agent is now executing.
chat.rejectedMessage: You rejected this action. The agent has been notified.

documentRequest.docReceived: Document received — AI agent is processing

chatConversation.msg1: Hello David! I'm your Genesis Orchestrator. I coordinate all AI agents working on your businesses. How can I help you today?
chatConversation.msg2: I need to register a new company called 'Apex Dynamics Ltd.' — can you handle that?
chatConversation.msg3:
Absolutely! I'll spin up GovReg-Agent to handle the company registration for Apex Dynamics Ltd. I'll need a few details:
• Registered address
• Director name(s)
• Share capital amount

Would you like me to pull these from your default profile, or will you provide them manually?
chatConversation.msg4: Use my default profile details. Also, flag it for VAT registration immediately.
chatConversation.msg5:
Got it. I've dispatched two agents in parallel:

✅ GovReg-Agent → Drafting Articles of Association with your default profile
⏳ TaxFin-Agent → Queued VAT registration (will execute once company ID is issued)

Estimated completion: ~15 minutes. I'll notify you when each step is done.
chatConversation.msg6: OpsHR-Agent has finished drafting the employment contract for your new hire. Please review and approve:
chatConversation.msg7: Meanwhile, TaxFin-Agent has prepared the VAT registration filing. This also requires your sign-off before submission:
chatConversation.msg8: ⚠️ TaxFin-Agent has paused the VAT registration workflow. It needs a lease agreement for the registered address before it can proceed. Please upload the document below:
chatConversation.responseDocReceived:
📄 Received the document! I've forwarded it to TaxFin-Agent for validation. The agent is now:

• Verifying document authenticity
• Extracting address details
• Cross-referencing with the registration form

Estimated processing time: ~2 minutes. I'll resume the VAT registration automatically once validation passes.
chatConversation.responseApproved: ✅ Noted! I've forwarded your approval to the responsible agent. Execution is now in progress — I'll update you once it's complete.
chatConversation.responseRejected: ❌ Understood. I've flagged the action as rejected. The agent will pause this task. Would you like to provide modification instructions?
chatConversation.responseGeneric: I've received your request and I'm coordinating with the relevant agents. I'll update you as soon as there's progress. Is there anything else you'd like me to handle?

hero.headline:
Don't open a business.
Spawn one.
hero.sub: Genesis is the AI-native operating system for business creation. One conversation. Autonomous agents. Full legal entity — live in minutes.
hero.ctaSub: No credit card required · Setup in under 5 minutes
hero.terminalUser1: I want to open a tech startup.

agents.title: The Board of Directors
agents.sub: Three specialized AI agents operate your business 24/7 — no coffee breaks, no sick days, no human error.
agents.govregDesc: Auto-generates corporate legal structures, files government registrations, and monitors ongoing compliance — all without human intervention.
agents.taxfinDesc: Manages VAT registration, tax filings, financial reporting, and bank account operations autonomously with full audit trails.
agents.opshrDesc: Handles employment contracts, payroll setup, benefits administration, and workplace compliance — ready for your first hire in seconds.

pipeline.title: The Trust Container
pipeline.sub: From idea to operating business in four seamless steps. Your liability is contained. Your growth is unlimited.
pipeline.step1Desc: Tell the Orchestrator what you need in plain language. No forms. No bureaucracy. No waiting rooms.
pipeline.step2Desc: Specialized AI agents work in parallel — legal, tax, HR — all coordinated autonomously in real-time.
pipeline.step3Desc: Your entity operates within a legal trust structure, shielding you from personal liability exposure.
pipeline.step4Desc: Focus on growth while agents handle compliance, filings, and operations around the clock.
